title: Working Like a Lawyer with Claude
summary: Mark Pike from Anthropic and Anna Gressel from Freshfields discuss how Claude is being used in legal work. They explore how AI is transforming legal practice while emphasizing that final judgment remains with the lawyer.
writeup: Mark Pike from Anthropic and Anna Gressel from Freshfields discuss how lawyers integrate Claude into legal work and how the practice is changing with AI assistance. The conversation covers multi-turn reasoning and AI-powered productivity in a domain where accuracy carries real stakes. The central point is that critical judgment stays with the lawyer: Claude supports the work, and a human remains in the loop to evaluate and own the conclusions.
